title: duguetia chrysocarpa
intro: Duguetia chrysocarpa, also known as the yellow fruit duguetia or simply duguetia, is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are said to have health benefits including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health.
